skills.description: Use after code edits when verifier, regression, and changed-surface evidence must be synchronized.
useWhen: closeout needs changed surface + verifier status
avoidWhen: no code or config changes occurred
task is pure research without repo mutation

skills.description: Use when closing or pausing a long-running task and a carry-forward bundle is required.
useWhen: operator needs a concise continuation bundle
avoidWhen: turn-local scratch work does not need persistence

skills.description: Use before declaring a long-running task session complete or paused to prevent false completion.
useWhen: verifier findings must be checked before handoff
